name: Supplier part unit compatible with base part unit is accepted
steps:
Given a part 'Copper Wire' has unit of measure 'm' (metres)
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in
When the user adds a supplier part for 'Copper Wire' and sets the supplier unit to 'ft' (feet)
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the supplier part is created with unit 'ft' and the system accepts it as compatible with 'm'

name: Supplier part unit incompatible with base part unit shows an error
steps:
Given a part 'Copper Wire' has unit of measure 'm' (metres)
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in
When the user adds a supplier part for 'Copper Wire' and sets the supplier unit to 'kg' (kilograms, incompatible with metres)
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the system displays an error indicating the supplier unit 'kg' is incompatible with the base unit 'm'
